MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON APR-27-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DAVID SPRAGUE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
